visualSamplesReviewed.notes: Anonymous advertising landing view is legible, centered, and free of internal engine language.
Political-review state is readable with no text collision or cropped status badge.

Initial visual sample showed a red Bad Request fetch error. ConsentGatePage now uses the dynamic CRUD client against xiigen-consent-records with the required tenant header; the refreshed PNG shows the quiet empty consent state.

repair.summary: Replaced direct /api/dynamic/consent-records calls with listDocs/createDoc on the valid xiigen-consent-records index and MASTER_TENANT_ID scoping.

verification.command: VITE_PORT=52020 npx playwright test e2e/ads-platform.spec.ts e2e/ads-platform-mock-states.spec.ts --reporter=line
